MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Candace Walton. Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for Plaintiff. appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Faamaile Faoa is present.
Attorney Amber Lu representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsel and litigants confer in D501.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of MAY-14-2012 is vacated.
